context.description: A high-concurrency agentic workflow portal interacting with a Go-based Super Node backend, Hasura, and Redpanda.

flow: 2. User signs SIWE message with wallet
4. Backend validates and sets session cookie

api_endpoints.name: Hasura GraphQL
api_endpoints.notes: Use for querying user data, tasks, and subscribing to workflow updates.

task_for_ide: Generate a robust SvelteKit SPA dashboard optimized for WebContainers (Bolt). 1. Setup 'Vercel AI SDK' to stream responses from the backend or direct LLM calls. 2. Integrate 'Rivet' for visualizing agent workflows (if a Rivet UI SDK is available, otherwise prepare components to display Rivet graph data). 3. Implement SIWE authentication using 'viem'. 4. Create a 'Control Plane' where users can trigger tools via the Go Gateway and view real-time updates from Hasura subscriptions. Ensure the UI is futuristic and responsive.
